facts_disclosed: Duc wedding July 12 2026, 150 guests, 45,000,000 dong budget

turns.content: friend i have good news today. very happy. my son Duc he going to get married
That's wonderful news! Congratulations to Duc and your whole family. When is the wedding planned for?
July 12 next year. his girlfriend name Thao. very nice girl, you know. polite, hardworking. good family from Can Tho
July 12, 2026 — that gives you about seven months to prepare. Thao sounds lovely. Have you met her family already?

yes we visit them two time already. good people. her father work in construction. mother sell fabric. they like Duc, you know. happy for him. in delta, groom family do the party. that is tradition. so we have to plan everything
That's a big responsibility for the groom's family. How many guests are you expecting? Delta weddings tend to be large celebrations with the whole community.

maybe 150 people. all the family, neighbor, friend. some people come from Can Tho side too, you know. Thao family and friend. 150 is what we think now. maybe more, always more come than you plan for hah

Ha — that's true everywhere, isn't it? Better to plan for a few extra. 150 guests is a proper celebration. Have you started thinking about the budget? Feeding and hosting that many people adds up fast.

yes this is the thing i am thinking about. i calculate everything. food, tent, table chair rental, music, decoration. i think maybe 45 million dong for everything. 45,000,000. is a lot of money, you know. but Duc only get married one time

45 million dong for 150 guests is a reasonable target — that works out to about 300,000 dong per guest all-in, which is tight but doable if you manage the costs carefully. The biggest expense is usually the food. Are you planning to hire a catering service or cook at home?

my wife already start talking about food every day. she more excited than Duc i think hah. she want cook herself with her sister and cousin help in kitchen. she say catering too expensive and food not as good, you know
Mothers and weddings — some things are universal! Home cooking with family help is the traditional way and much cheaper than catering. What kind of menu is she planning?

shrimp dish of course we have supply for that, you know. pork, chicken, duck, spring roll, soup, rice. delta style. many dish. i tell her not too many but she say this is Duc wedding, must be good. she right i think

She's right — a son's wedding feast should be something people remember. And having your own shrimp supply for the menu is a huge advantage. That's one of the most expensive items crossed off the list for free.

With home cooking for 150, the food cost might come down to 18-22 million dong, which leaves room in the 45 million budget for tent rental, music, and other things. A few practical tips for cooking at that scale:

- Plan dishes that can be prepped a day ahead — marinades, sauces, desserts
- Make sure you have enough large pots, woks, and burners. Might need to borrow extras from neighbors
- Ice and cold storage is the biggest challenge — keeping ingredients fresh for 150 portions in July heat

yes July is hot month, you know. ice is important. but we have space under the house, cool there. and my neighbor he have big freezer, i ask to borrow. table and chair i can borrow too. his daughter have wedding last year, he have many table

Borrowing tables and the freezer from the neighbor is smart — that could save you 3-5 million dong right there compared to renting. What about decorations? That's another cost that can run away quickly.

flower for decoration we have plenty around house. bougainvillea everywhere, you know. red, pink, very beautiful. no need buy decoration from shop. my wife say she and Thao mother can make the decoration together. good way for two family to work together before wedding

Bougainvillea decorations would look beautiful and festive — bright colors, completely free, and the two families working together is a wonderful way to build the bond before the big day. Between the home cooking, borrowed tables, garden flowers, and your own shrimp, you're keeping costs well under control.

So to summarize: July 12, 150 guests, 45 million dong budget, home-cooked feast with your wife running the kitchen, borrowed tables and freezer, garden flowers for decoration. That's a solid plan.
yes that is my plan. and good harvest in dry season, save money, pay for wedding. shrimp pay for everything in this family, you know. hah. even pay for Duc to start new life

Shrimp funding the wedding — that's the Mekong Delta way! If prices hold through dry season, a good harvest between now and July could cover a big chunk of the cost. You've got a clear goal to work toward.
yes friend. i work hard now, save money. Duc he work hard too on his pond. he want to show Thao family that he can provide, you know. i am proud of him. he is good boy

That's a father's pride talking. Duc taking responsibility and wanting to prove himself — that's the kind of thing that makes a marriage start strong. The whole family pulling together for this is really something.
okay friend i go now. have to check pond before dark. wedding important but shrimp still need eat today hah. thank you for listening. sometime nice to share good news, you know

The shrimp don't care about weddings — they want their feed on time! It's great to hear happy news for a change. Go take care of the ponds, and as July gets closer, if you need help with planning or budgeting, I'm here. Congratulations again to the whole family. Have a good evening!
